dealer.position: Push all heritage targets simultaneously. Persia first, Caribe opportunistic.

shield.position: Cannot sustain more than 2 theaters. Recommend against Caribe action if Persia active.

shadow.cathay_assessment: Naval buildup at 9. Formosa window analysis: not imminent.
shadow.position: Cathay is the primary strategic threat. Recommend increased Pacific presence.

anchor.position: Caribe action NOW while we have the initiative. Persia must conclude with regime change.

volt.position: Reduce foreign commitments. America First. Cut European subsidies. Focus on domestic economy.

tribune.position: Block military adventurism. Investigate executive overreach.

internal_dynamics: Early rounds: Dealer consolidating. Volt and Anchor competing for successor position. Shield reluctantly executing. Tribune building case.
final_decision: Round 1: Dealer prioritizes military operations. Budget: 27% social, 40% military, 12% tech.  Heartland arms transfer approved.
